pr.title: Value Residual + Gated Attention + XSA + EMA + AdamW TTT — val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Restores large BigramHash and layers EMA, value residual, gated attention, XSA, plus AdamW-based test-time tuning atop the thwu1 stack.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Runs deterministic AdamW/SGD test-time training on validation tokens before each evaluation.
techniques: BigramHash + EMA + Value Residual & Gated Attention stack
XSA in final layers to remove self-value bias
AdamW-powered test-time training on validation shard
